name: Sesame Cookies
recipeIngredient: Red and green candied cherry halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add the sugar and beat until well combined.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
6. Chill the dough for several hours or overnight.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Shape the chilled dough into 1-inch balls and roll them in sesame seeds.
9. Place the cookie balls on an unbuttered baking sheet.
10. Press a red and green candied cherry half into each cookie ball.
11. Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until golden brown.
